pattern: Track the range of possible open-paren counts as wildcards flex between open, close, and empty, accepting only when zero stays reachable.
hints: A star is flexible: it can act like an extra open bracket, an extra close bracket, or nothing at all.
Instead of fixing each star, keep a running low and high estimate of how many unmatched open brackets could exist after each character.
Raise both bounds on '(', lower both on ')', and widen the range on '*'; if the high bound ever drops below zero the string is doomed, and at the end zero must lie within the surviving range.

edge_inputs.description: star fills the middle as nothing
star must absorb an extra close
single star alone is an empty string
stars cannot fix a close that comes too early
too many opens for the available stars

stress.description: random strings over the three characters at moderate length
constructed balanced strings with stars sprinkled in to stress the lenient direction
